ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section. */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the section. */,
  "loop_value" TEXT /* Value determining the number of loop iterations. */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* The index position where looping starts. */,
  "step_value" INTEGER /* The step value for traversing the loop array. */,
  "max_iterations" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the section will loop. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the section's purpose. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the section was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the section. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to. */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security). */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login. */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template. */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration template. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template's purpose. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the template. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project configuration. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section defined in configuration_sections. */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used for this configuration. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration. */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project this configuration belongs to. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES configuration_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration section. */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number for tracking changes. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section being accessed. */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred. */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update). */,
  "access_result" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section that was changed. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change. */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, modified, deleted). */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made. */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that this permission is associated with. */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this permission allows. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification. */,
  "message" TEXT /* The notification message. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created. */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section this parameter belongs to. */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* The name of the parameter. */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* The value of the parameter. */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter's purpose. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency. */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section that has a dependency. */,
  "dependent_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section that is depended on. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_dependencies_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_dependencies_dependent_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_section_id") REFERENCES configuration_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team. */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this team is working on. */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team. */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_configurations ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member. */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team this member belongs to. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has in the team. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES project_teams ("team_id")
)
